title: Oil and gas majors stay cautious on renewables despite strong long-term growth
snippet:
GlobalData says renewables will exceed 40% of global power by 2030, but oil and gas firms remain cautious on investment pace

ai_summary: Global renewable energy capacity continues to grow strongly, reaching 40% of power generation by 2030, which supports long-term demand for renewable energy suppliers like tem.
ai_reasoning: This is general industry background on renewable energy growth trends. While relevant to understanding the overall market trajectory for tem's business, it contains no specific information about UK I&C market dynamics, tem's operations, competitors, or regulatory changes that would require immediate action.
